description: SQLite-backed hybrid (vector + FTS) code search index for Claude Code over MCP.
name: io.github.achreftlili/code-index

environmentVariables.description: Embedder backend. Only 'jina' (local jina-embeddings-v2-base-code via sentence-transformers) is supported; the variable exists for future expansion.
environmentVariables.name: CODE_INDEX_EMBEDDER

environmentVariables.description: HuggingFace model id. Defaults to 'jinaai/jina-embeddings-v2-base-code'. Override only if you know the model is dim-compatible.
environmentVariables.name: CODE_INDEX_EMBED_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Embedding dimension. Defaults to 768 (matches jina-embeddings-v2-base-code). Must match the model's output dim.
environmentVariables.name: CODE_INDEX_EMBED_DIM

environmentVariables.description: Path to the SQLite index database. Defaults to .claude/index.db relative to the working directory.
environmentVariables.name: CODE_INDEX_DB

title: Code Index
